channel.title: HTML on Cosima Meyer
channel.description: Recent content in HTML on Cosima Meyer

item.title: Tweaking Hugo Portio theme
item.description: New year, new website? Well, not really. But when starting to set up and move RAM’s website, I decided that it was probably also time for a fresh look on my own little blog. As always, coming up with the perfect theme and moving everything to your new and fully polished website takes longer than expected. The main reason is that it is hard to settle on the perfect theme. Spoiler alert, there is no such thing.
